free_text: Scattering of 14.1-MeV neutrons from 10B, 11B, C, N, O,
T(d,n) neutrons at 90 deg (for En=14.1 MeV) and
Cylinders of B4C (90% enriched to 10B), boron, carbon,
Si3N4, SiO2, CF2 and Si (2.5 or 3.5 cm in diam. and
The samples other than carbon and CF2 were encased in
Flight path length of 4 to 6 m
A well shielded NE213 liquid scintillator
(5 in diam x 2 in thick) incorporating two separate
neutron-gamma discriminators with 0.3 and 2 MeV bias
The relative efficiency was determined to +/-4% by
combining the calculation and the measurement of
A smaller NE213 detector monitored the source neutrons
- background due to parasitic d-D neutrons.
